## Notes

1. Implicit type parameters {m n : Nat} for dimensions
2. Simple negation of IsRegularValue
3. Can be unfolded with simp [IsCriticalValue, IsRegularValue]
4. Equivalent to: exists x, f x = y AND not (IsSubmersionAt f x)

- IsSubmersionAt: Defined in same file (lines 6-7)
